mapper.select: SELECT id, name, password_hash AS pass, stamps, role FROM t_user ORDER BY id
SELECT id, name, password_hash AS pass, stamps, role FROM t_user ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user (id, name, password_hash, stamps, role) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{pass}, COALESCE(#{stamps}, 0), #{role})
